stemHtml: A pilot engages the control wheel steering (CWS) of a conventional autopilot and carries out a manoeuvre in roll. When the control wheel is released, the autopilot will…

options.a: restore the flight attitude and the rate of turn selected on the autopilot control display unit.
options.b: roll wings level and maintain the heading obtained at that moment.
options.c: maintain the flight attitude obtained at that moment.
options.d: maintain the track and the flight attitude obtained at that moment.
